Data.Name: Heavy Revolver
Data.Description: A handgun with enough stopping power to drop a crazed rhino, and heavy enough to beat it to death if you're out of ammo. Part of Executives and Other Criminals.

3336103030.Description: Bullets with bright visible markers that match the tint of the gun.
3336103030.Name: Tracer Rounds

15712037.Description: Bullets which set targets on fire when shot.

Data.Name: Heavy Revolver Mk II
Data.Description: If you can lift it, this is the closest you'll get to shooting someone with a freight train.

Data.Name: Heavy Sniper
Data.Description: Features armor-piercing rounds for heavy damage. Comes with laser scope as standard.

Data.Name: Homing Launcher
Data.Description: Infrared guided fire-and-forget missile launcher. For all your moving target needs. Part of the Festive Surprise.

Data.Name: RPG
Data.Description: A portable, shoulder-launched, anti-tank weapon that fires explosive warheads. Very effective for taking down vehicles or large groups of assailants.

Data.Name: Sawed-Off Shotgun
Data.Description: This single-barrel, sawed-off shotgun compensates for its low range and ammo capacity with devastating efficiency in close combat.
America's West African arms trade isn't just about giving. Rediscover the simple life with this rusty cleaver. Part of Lowriders.
Data.Name: Machete
Pipe Bomb
Data.Description: Remember, it doesn't count as an IED when you buy it in a store and use it in a first world country. Part of Bikers.

Data.Name: Minigun
Data.Description: A devastating 6-barrel machine gun that features Gatling-style rotating barrels. Very high rate of fire (2000 to 6000 rounds per minute).

Data.Name: Advanced Rifle
Data.Description: The most lightweight and compact of all assault rifles, without compromising accuracy and rate of fire.

696788003.Description: Increased penetration of Body Armor. Reduced capacity.
696788003.Name: Armor Piercing Rounds

Data.Name: Combat MG Mk II
Data.Description: You can never have too much of a good thing: after all, if the first shot counts, then the next hundred or so must count for double.
Standard length, mid iron golf club with rubber grip for a lethal short game.
Data.Name: Golf Club
Railgun
Data.Description: All you need to know is - magnets, and it does horrible things to the things it's pointed at. Exclusive content for returning players.
There's retro, there's vintage, and there's this. After 500 years of technological development and spiritual apocalypse, pre-Colombian chic is back.
Data.Name: Stone Hatchet

Data.Description: A robust, multi-purpose hammer with wooden handle and curved claw, this old classic still nails the competition.
Data.Name: Hammer

Meta.About: Crafty and useful for many situations.

Data.Name: Firework Launcher
Data.Description: Put the flair back in flare with this firework launcher, guaranteed to raise some oohs and aahs from the crowd. Part of the Independence Day Special.
24" polycarbonate side-handled nightstick.
Data.Name: Nightstick

Meta.About: A beat stick, for the typical beat cop.

Data.Name: Vintage Pistol
Data.Description: What you really need is a more recognizable gun. Stand out from the crowd at an armed robbery with this engraved pistol. Part of The "I'm Not a Hipster" Update.

Data.Name: Pump Shotgun
Data.Description: Standard shotgun ideal for short-range combat. A high-projectile spread makes up for its lower accuracy at long range.

Meta.About: Elephants love em, good ol' stampy.

4100968569.Description: Increased penetration of Body Armor. Reduced capacity.

Data.Name: Marksman Rifle Mk II
Data.Description: Known in military circles as The Dislocator, this mod set will destroy both the target and your shoulder, in that order.

Meta.About: Elephants love em, good ol' stampy.

Data.Name: Unholy Hellbringer
Data.Description: Republican Space Ranger Special. If you want to turn a little green man into little green goo, this is the only American way to do it.

Meta.About: I wonder if Coke is still in these?

Data.Name: Grenade Launcher
Data.Description: A compact, lightweight grenade launcher with semi-automatic functionality. Holds up to 10 rounds.

Data.Name: Carbine Rifle
Data.Description: Combining long distance accuracy with a high-capacity magazine, the carbine rifle can be relied on to make the hit.

Data.Name: SNS Pistol
Data.Description: Like condoms or hairspray, this fits in your pocket for a night out in a Vinewood club. It's half as accurate as a champagne cork but twice as deadly. Part of the Beach Bum Pack.

Meta.About: Commonly contained in a cigerrete packet.
If lemonade was made in GTA...
Comes in Orange & Grape, but not Watermelon.

Data.Name: Sniper Rifle
Data.Description: Standard sniper rifle. Ideal for situations that require accuracy at long range. Limitations include slow reload speed and very low rate of fire.

Data.Name: Combat MG
Data.Description: Lightweight, compact machine gun that combines excellent maneuverability with a high rate of fire to devastating effect.

Data.Name: Combat Shotgun
Data.Description: There's only one semi-automatic shotgun with a fire rate that sets the LSFD alarm bells ringing, and you're looking at it.

Data.Name: SMG
Data.Description: This is known as a good all-round submachine gun. Lightweight with an accurate sight and 30-round magazine capacity.
Aluminum baseball bat with leather grip. Lightweight yet powerful for all you big hitters out there.
Data.Name: Baseball Bat

Data.Description: This carbon steel 7" bladed knife is dual edged with a serrated spine to provide improved stabbing and thrusting capabilities.
Data.Name: Knife

Meta.About: A sharp tool used for skinning.

Data.Name: AP Pistol
Data.Description: High-penetration, fully-automatic pistol. Holds 18 rounds in magazine with option to extend to 36 rounds.

Data.Name: Double Barrel Shotgun
Data.Description: Do one thing, do it well. Who needs a high rate of fire when your first shot turns the other guy into a fine mist? Part of Lowriders: Custom Classics.
Ah, there's no sound as satisfying as the crack of a perfect break, especially when it's the other guy's spine. Part of Bikers.
Data.Name: Pool Cue

Meta.About: A friendly game until it's not.

Data.Description: Make kindling... of your pals with this easy to wield, easy to hide hatchet. Exclusive content for returning players.
Data.Name: Hatchet

Data.Name: Bullpup Rifle Mk II
Data.Description: So precise, so exquisite, it's not so much a hail of bullets as a symphony.

Data.Name: Bullpup Shotgun
Data.Description: More than makes up for its slow, pump-action rate of fire with its range and spread.  Decimates anything in its projectile path.
It's not clever and it's not pretty but, most of the time, neither is the guy coming at you with a knife. When all else fails, this gets the job done. Part of the Beach Bum Pack.
Data.Name: Bottle

Meta.About: Drunks and Bums love to fight with these.

Data.Name: Pistol .50
Data.Description: High-impact pistol that delivers immense power but with extremely strong recoil. Holds 9 rounds in magazine.

3914869031.Description: Increased damage to targets without Body Armor.
3914869031.Name: Flechette Shells

2676628469.Description: Has a chance to set targets on fire when shot.
2676628469.Name: Dragon's Breath Shells

1108334355.Description: Accurate sight for close quarters combat.
1108334355.Name: Holographic Sight

Data.Name: Pump Shotgun Mk II
Data.Description: Only one thing pumps more action than a pump action: watch out, the recoil is almost as deadly as the shot.

Data.Name: Marksman Rifle
Data.Description: Whether you're up close or a disconcertingly long way away, this weapon will get the job done. A multi-range tool for tools. Part of the Last Team Standing Update.

Data.Name: Bullpup Rifle
Data.Description: The latest Chinese import taking America by storm, this rifle is known for its balanced handling. Lightweight and very controllable in automatic fire. Part of The High Life Update.

Meta.About: Just a cup of Joe's finest.

Data.Name: Gusenberg Sweeper
Data.Description: Complete your look with a Prohibition gun. Looks great being fired from an Albany Roosevelt or paired with a pinstripe suit. Part of the Valentine's Day Massacre Special.

Data.Name: Marksman Pistol
Data.Description: Not for the risk averse. Make it count as you'll be reloading as much as you shoot. Part of The Ill-Gotten Gains Update Part 2.

Data.Name: Tear Gas
Data.Description: Tear gas grenade, particularly effective at incapacitating multiple assailants. Sustained exposure can be lethal.
Perfect for knocking out gold teeth, or as a gift to the trophy partner who has everything. Part of The Ill-Gotten Gains Update Part 2.
Data.Name: Knuckle Duster
Combat PDW
Data.Description: Who said personal weaponry couldn't be worthy of military personnel? Thanks to our lobbyists, not Congress. Integral suppressor. Part of the Ill-Gotten Gains Update Part 1.
Perennial favourite of apocalyptic survivalists and violent fathers the world over, apparently it also doubles as some kind of tool. Part of Bikers.
Data.Name: Pipe Wrench
Musket
Data.Description: Armed with nothing but muskets and a superiority complex, the Brits took over half the world. Own the gun that built an empire. Part of the Independence Day Special.

Data.Name: Ceramic Pistol
Data.Description: Not your grandma's ceramics. Although this pint-sized pistol is small enough to fit into her purse and won't set off a metal detector.

Data.Name: Heavy Pistol
Data.Description: The heavyweight champion of the magazine fed, semi-automatic handgun world. Delivers a serious forearm workout every time. Part of The Business Update.

Data.Name: Compact Rifle
Data.Description: Half the size, all the power, double the recoil: there's no riskier way to say "I'm compensating for something". Part of Lowriders: Custom Classics.

Data.Description: Far away, yet always intimate: if you're looking for a secure foundation for that long-distance relationship, this is it.

Data.Name: Perico Pistol
Data.Description: A deadly shot. Don't be precious. You won't scuff the titanium nitride finish.
From your pocket to hilt-deep in the other guy's ribs in under a second: folding knives will never go out of style. Part of Executives and Other Criminals.
Data.Name: Switchblade
Special Carbine
Data.Description: Combining accuracy, maneuverability and low recoil, this is an extremely versatile assault rifle for any combat situation. Part of The Business Update.
Intensify your fear of the dark with this short range, battery-powered light source. Handy for blunt force trauma. Part of The Halloween Surprise.
Data.Name: Flashlight

Data.Name: SNS Pistol Mk II
Data.Description: The ultimate purse-filler: if you want to make Saturday Night really special, this is your ticket.

Data.Name: Double-Action Revolver
Data.Description: Because sometimes revenge is a dish best served six times, in quick succession, right between the eyes. Part of The Doomsday Heist.

Data.Name: Combat Pistol
Data.Description: A compact, lightweight, semi-automatic pistol designed for law enforcement and personal defense. 12-round magazine with option to extend to 16 rounds.

Data.Name: Machine Pistol
Data.Description: This fully automatic is the snare drum to your twin-engine V8 bass: no drive-by sounds quite right without it. Part of Lowriders.

Data.Name: Heavy Shotgun
Data.Description: The weapon to reach for when you absolutely need to make a horrible mess of the room. Best used near easy-wipe surfaces only. Part of the Last Team Standing Update.

Data.Name: Jerry Can
Data.Description: Leaves a trail of gasoline that can be ignited.

Data.Name: Molotov
Data.Description: Crude yet highly effective incendiary weapon. No happy hour with this cocktail.

Data.Name: Sticky Bomb
Data.Description: A plastic explosive charge fitted with a remote detonator. Can be thrown and then detonated or attached to a vehicle then detonated.

Data.Name: Grenade
Data.Description: Standard fragmentation grenade. Pull pin, throw, then find cover. Ideal for eliminating clustered assailants.

Data.Name: Sweeper Shotgun
Data.Description: How many effective tools for riot control can you tuck into your pants? OK, two. But this is the other one. Part of Bikers.

Data.Name: Stun Gun
Data.Description: Fires a projectile that administers a voltage capable of temporarily stunning an assailant. Takes approximately 4 seconds to recharge after firing.

Data.Description: This is bespoke, artisan firepower: you couldn't deliver a hail of bullets with more love and care if you inserted them by hand.
You've been rocking the pirate-chic look for a while, but no vicious weapon to complete the look? Get this dagger with guarded hilt. Part of The "I'm Not a Hipster" Update.
Data.Name: Antique Cavalry Dagger
Assault Shotgun
Data.Description: Fully automatic shotgun with 8 round magazine and high rate of fire.

Data.Name: MG
Data.Description: General purpose machine gun that combines rugged design with dependable performance. Long range penetrative power. Very effective against large groups.

Data.Name: SMG Mk II
Data.Description: Lightweight, compact, with a rate of fire to die very messily for: turn any confined space into a kill box at the click of a well-oiled trigger.

Data.Name: SMG
Data.Description: This is known as a good all-round submachine gun. Lightweight with an accurate sight and 30-round magazine capacity.

Data.Name: Micro SMG
Data.Description: Combines compact design with a high rate of fire at approximately 700-900 rounds per minute.

Data.Name: Proximity Mine
Data.Description: Leave a present for your friends with these motion sensor landmines. Short delay after activation. Part of the Festive Surprise.

Data.Name: Pistol
Data.Description: Standard handgun. A .45 caliber pistol with a magazine capacity of 12 rounds that can be extended to 16.
It's not clever and it's not pretty but, most of the time, neither is the guy coming at you with a knife. When all else fails, this gets the job done. Part of the Beach Bum Pack.
Data.Name: Bottle

Meta.About: There is roleplaying, then there is DnD

Data.Name: Flare Gun
Data.Description: Use to signal distress or drunken excitement. Warning: pointing directly at individuals may cause spontaneous combustion. Part of The Heists Update.
Aluminum baseball bat with leather grip. Lightweight yet powerful for all you big hitters out there.
Data.Name: Baseball Bat

Meta.About: Home invader? Hit them like a home run!.
Packaged Goods? I wonder what's inside...

Data.Name: Compact Grenade Launcher
Data.Description: Focus groups using the regular model suggested it was too accurate and found it awkward to use with one hand on the throttle. Easy fix. Part of Bikers.
